name: menu_and_view_toggles
description: Press Ctrl+` (the View > Terminal accelerator wired in MenuController) to toggle the terminal panel on, screenshot, toggle off, screenshot. Validates the accelerator wiring + AUI pane show/hide for the terminal pane. The terminal panel is hidden by default (S5.B); the script also confirms that the panel widget exists in the UIA tree once shown. The panel root is addressed via `parent_aid=locus.main_frame name=locus.terminal.panel deep=true` rather than a top-level automation_id lookup, because initially-hidden AUI panes don't always surface as direct top-level findable elements -- a deep subtree walk from the main frame works reliably.
